payload.key_insight: KKR is a global alternative asset management and insurance firm with no meaningful supply-chain, operational, or sector overlap with Domino's Pizza. The filing contains no qualitative language pertaining to consumer spending, food-service demand, franchisee health, delivery economics, or any other factor relevant to DPZ's earnings trajectory.
specific_quotes: 2025 was a strong year for KKR. We had record annual figures across our key metrics, including Fee Related Earnings and Adjusted Net Income per share, capital raised and capital invested.
KKR is a leading global investment firm that offers alternative asset management as well as capital markets and insurance solutions.
KKR sponsors investment funds that invest in private equity, credit and real assets and has strategic partners that manage hedge funds.
